news.paragraph: Boeing traders should note that CEO Kelly Ortberg is scheduled to speak at the Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference on May 27, which could act as a catalyst for the stock. The company is also subject to broader macro volatility as President Trump arrives in China for a trade summit alongside a group of prominent CEOs. These developments may influence market sentiment regarding trade relations and future company guidance.
